description: Approved Dashboard Collection-based dataset presentation references. Generated Dashboard Collection controls must select one of these references and preserve the selected template structure; unknown or simplified Collection layouts are not generated-final eligible.

references.sourceReference: Company Overview v1.4 / Collection_control_responsive_card_grid export-shaped component template
whenToUse: Users need to browse business records as responsive cards.
The dataset has a small to medium field set with visual status, owner, date, file, image, or summary metadata.
Card scanning is more useful than dense row comparison.
The page needs a display-first card grid, optionally with item operations for Data List or Document Library sources.
whenNotToUse: Bulk row/card selection or a selected-items toolbar is required.
The requirement asks for table headers, column alignment, or grid-table scanning.
The source is Form Report or Data Report and edit/delete item operations are requested; those sources are view-only.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_responsive_card_grid for the Dashboard dataset region and explain the card-browsing/display-first business reason, plus whether item operations are allowed by the source type.
generationProof: card_col_body Collection root with explicit template provenance
card_col_item repeated item template with Dynamic controls matched to field types
no Dynamic image unless the selected data source has an Image field
grid_table_col_item_op_menu actions and delete-confirmation temp variable only when item operations are present
references.proofBoundary: Export-proven responsive card grid component only; not proof for grid-table, card multiselect toolbar, grouped, nested, gallery, timeline, or Kanban layouts. Form Report/Data Report uses are view-only and must not include edit/delete item actions.

references.displayName: Responsive Card Collection With Multiselect Toolbar
references.sourceReference: Company Overview v1.3 / Collection card multiple select / card_with_multiselect_toolbar_wrapper
whenToUse: Users need card browsing plus multi-record selection.
The business action is batch update, batch close, batch archive, batch approve, or batch delete on card records.
whenNotToUse: Bulk operations cannot be expressed with the export-proven Collection action shape.
Only a read-only dashboard card list is needed.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_card_with_multiselect_toolbar and identify the batch operation business need.
references.proofBoundary: Do not infer grid-table checkbox-column behavior from this card pattern.
exportShapeContract: preserve Collection root attrs.actions and multiselect action settings
include page-level filterVars, tempVars, actions, filter, and formAction dependencies
allow edits only in card_col_title_wrapper, op_normal, op_multipleselected, card_col_item, and card_col_item_operations

references.sourceReference: Projects Center_1 v1.7 / Collection_control_grid_table / grid_table_col_wrapper export-shaped template
whenToUse: Users need dense row/column scanning without multi-select or fulltext-search specialization.
The dataset has comparable fields such as status, owner, due date, priority, progress, category, or other operational columns.
A Collection item template is required instead of a plain Data table, and row/item operations may be available for Data List or Document Library sources.
whenNotToUse: The dataset needs multi-row selection and batch actions; use collection_control_grid_table_with_multiselect.
The dataset primarily needs card browsing, bulk selection, or high-fidelity primary operations treatment.
The data should be shown as cards, Kanban, timeline, grouped, nested, or gallery.
The region is display-only and a native Data table was explicitly requested instead of a Collection.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_grid_table for the Dashboard dataset region and explain why dense row/column scanning is needed without multi-select/search specialization.
generationProof: grid_table_col_title_wrapper mapped to the current business dataset title
op_normal mapped or intentionally omitted according to actions/search needs
grid_table_col_header and grid_col_item have matching column count, widths, and column property signatures
grid_table_col_body Collection root binds to the selected source resource
Dynamic controls selected by field type: dynamic-user, dynamic-image, dynamic-file, or dynamic-field
optional grid_table_col_item_operations binds each button to Collection actions and is omitted for display-only/non-editable sources
references.proofBoundary: Export-shaped grid_table_col_wrapper component only; Dashboard page shell must still come from Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1.

exportShapeContract.lockedRule: All controls outside editable regions must strictly preserve exported style/layout/font/control settings.

references.sourceReference: Projects Center_1 v1.6 / All Tasks - multiple select / grid_table_col_multiselect_wrapper
whenToUse: Users need dense table scanning plus multi-row selection.
The business process needs batch assign, batch close, batch approve, batch status update, batch reminder, batch archive, batch export, or batch delete.
whenNotToUse: Users need card selection rather than table selection.
Batch operations cannot be represented with export-proven Collection actions.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select collection_control_grid_table_with_multiselect and name the concrete batch operation. Projects Center / Project Tasks is the source proof only, not a business-domain restriction.
generationProof: Collection root attrs.actions[] with type coll
references.proofBoundary: May be used for any matching Dashboard dataset, not only Project Tasks; runtime execution still needs focused proof. Must use the full export-shaped grid_table_col_multiselect_wrapper template, not a simplified grid-table with ad hoc checkbox icons.
exportShapeContract: preserve Collection root attrs.actions and multiselect action settings
include page-level filterVars, tempVars, actions, filter, and formAction dependencies
allow edits only in grid_table_col_title_wrapper, op_normal, op_multipleselected, grid_table_col_header, and grid_col_item
keep grid_table_col_header and grid_col_item column count, widths, and compatible grid properties identical

references.sourceReference: Marketing Event Management Event Portfolio Dashboard Golden Reference
whenToUse: The Dashboard needs a high-fidelity primary operations list.
Rows need rich status badge, progress, owner/person, health, budget/date, or similar visual cells.
The region is the main dashboard work queue, pipeline, or portfolio table.
whenNotToUse: A lightweight secondary list is enough.
The business asks for cards or bulk checkbox selection.
The region does not need the richer Event Portfolio visual treatment.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select Event Pipeline Grid-Table and map business fields to the reference columns without copying Marketing Event fields.
references.proofBoundary: Use as component region inside Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 slots; do not copy the Event Portfolio root shell.
